CATALYST-BLUE_SLEIGH_BELL.description: At the start of combat, gain [gold]Grow[/gold] equal to this relic's stacks. Your positive finite [gold]Grow[/gold] and [gold]Shrink[/gold] applications use Catalyst's stack-scaling rules instead of the vanilla flat-strength version. Vanilla enemy and potion Shrink sources remain unchanged.
CATALYST-BLUE_SLEIGH_BELL.flavor: Each toll leaves a little more mass in its wake.
CATALYST-BLUE_SLEIGH_BELL.title: Blue Sleigh Bell
